textByHash.7883484821c5cfdaee03f4eb2cf691692681bf68: Hello, welcome to the Cooking Guild. Only accomplished chefs and cooks are allowed in here. Feel free to use any of our facilities.
textByHash.0c55c7e4efd2c60c79c643ae26d211b3ecc7fd7d: Thank you! It's my most prized possession, it's a Skillcape of Cooking; it shows that I've achieved level 99 Cooking and am one of the best chefs in the land!
textByHash.7376e03c3595edb3560012aa97d3dcbccb500683: If you ever achieve level 99 cooking you'll get to wear one too and doing so means you'll never burn any food!
textByHash.03bc2a10090d27bd438aa398a74a195535595091: Hello, welcome to the Cooking Guild. It's always great to have such an accomplished chef visit us. Say, would you be interested in a Skillcape of Cooking? They're only available to master chefs.
textByHash.b317d20c1adfaa8987e9b9453a23a8aa030ac58f: Okay, come back to me if you change your mind.
textByHash.90748d2362c63ed08ec4f759de0fb21fbce7e2ca: Most certainly, by wearing this cape you'll never burn any food, I will have to ask for 99000 gold coins for such a privilege.
textByHash.0aea1eb40c10c2f736d073912d2383a9fc9fe4d9: I'm sorry you feel that way.
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.527f80de368a9db08d151ce121e6ddf14fd29ef6: Now you can use the title Master Chef.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
textByHash.9debcd1fd5829cb6b011640ea5d14281404d56ef: You can't come in here unless you're wearing a chef's hat, or something like that.
textByHash.1dafba5225b0a1b62b143fcb864d0e7d9c62711b: Sorry. Only the finest chefs are allowed in here. Get your cooking level up to 32 and come back wearing a chef's hat.
textByHash.cbbf85c9061109b2d8d7d3c4a4f9716fdd772baf: Sorry. Only the finest chefs are allowed in here. Get your cooking level up to 32.
